assertions.title: fetch fallback is explicitly attributed with low-content diagnostics

steps.action: Triggered discovery run with browser_plus_ats preset and unrestricted scope
steps.expected: Run executes grounded_web lane with fetch fallback diagnostics
steps.observed: Run completed with grounded_web diagnostics showing fetch_fallback and low_content_spa codes

steps.expected: Structured diagnostics array contains fetch_fallback and low_content_spa codes with context and URL attribution
steps.observed: diagnostics array contains 7 entries: 3 fetch_fallback codes with URL context, 3 low_content_spa codes, and 1 zero_results code

diagnosticsFound.context: Browser-use command failed; fell back to plain HTTP fetch for https://www.cotiviti.com/careers/job-details/?jobId=R0008447. Error: Browser Use command exited 127: /bin/sh: browser-use: command not found
Response for https://www.cotiviti.com/careers/job-details/?jobId=R0008447 contains skeleton/loading patterns suggesting an SPA or dynamic loading state.

assertions.title: zero-result outcomes expose structured diagnostics while preserving warning compatibility

steps.action: Triggered discovery run with browser_plus_ats preset that produced zero results
steps.expected: Structured diagnostics contain zero_results code AND warnings array contains corresponding string
steps.observed: diagnostics array contains zero_results code with context; warnings array contains 'Grounded web extraction returned zero job listings from 4 candidate pages.'

structuredDiagnostic.context: Extracted zero job listings from 4 candidate pages. All pages either had no extractable content or failed to load.

evidence.warningString: Grounded web extraction returned zero job listings from 4 candidate pages.

assertions.title: degraded zero-result path remains source-attributed with dual-layer diagnostics

steps.action: Verified zero-result diagnostics include source attribution (URLs) and dual-layer structure
steps.expected: Structured diagnostics have URL attribution AND warnings array has string messages
steps.observed: fetch_fallback diagnostics include URL field; low_content_spa diagnostics include URL field; zero_results diagnostic includes context with page count; warnings array has corresponding string messages

evidence.sourceAttribution: URLs present in fetch_fallback and low_content_spa diagnostics

dualLayerStructure.structured: diagnostics array with code + context + url fields
dualLayerStructure.warnings: warnings array with human-readable string messages

diagnostic.context: Browser-use command failed; fell back to plain HTTP fetch for https://www.cotiviti.com/careers/job-details/?jobId=R0008447

examples.warning: Session fallback: browser-use command unavailable for https://www.cotiviti.com/careers/job-details/?jobId=R0008447; used plain fetch instead.
Session fallback: browser-use command unavailable for https://www.cotiviti.com/careers/job-details/?jobId=R0008447; used plain fetch instead.

frictions.description: Webho keeecret validation failed initially - had to use correct format (string instead of array for targetRoles)
frictions.resolution: DiscoveryProfile type expects targetRoles as string, not array. Used comma-separated string format.

frictions.description: ats_only preset excludes grounded_web source, preventing testing of grounded_web diagnostics
frictions.resolution: Used browser_plus_ats preset to enable grounded_web execution

summary: Tested 3 assertions (VAL-OBS-001, VAL-OBS-003, VAL-CROSS-002) via curl API surface using run_df8faeb2b4bb456c83ed4570c0b8a8b8. All assertions PASS. Evidence shows: (1) fetch_fallback and low_content_spa diagnostic codes with URL attribution and context, (2) zero_results diagnostic code with dual-layer structure (structured code + warnings array string), (3) source attribution preserved in diagnostics with URL fields. No blockers encountered.
